name: Applesauce Muffins (No Guilt Baking)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the egg, oil, and applesauce.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the mixture and blend until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased muffin pan lined with no-stick paper or lightly greased with cooking spray.
4. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 25 minutes, or until the muffins are lightly browned on top and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Allow the muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature. These muffins make about 12 servings.
